LJC_SR_V1.0_Draft_171024

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 788
Recv ID: 7A8
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 47
Func Name: SR

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "WHE",
    "soft": "100000000",
    "version": "000000000001"
  }
]

      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },

      },

        "bitoffset": 2
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,

      },

        "firstbyte": 6

        "firstbyte": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
